category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Thailand market access under TISI / EGAT / MEA requirements.

title.en: China-to-Thailand Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入泰国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入泰國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Thailand TISI TIS 2783 mandatory efficiency, EGAT/MEA grid, and EMC expectations for exporters.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与泰国 TISI TIS 2783 强制能效、EGAT/MEA 电网及 EMC 要求差距对照，供出口商参考。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與泰國 TISI TIS 2783 強制能效、EGAT/MEA 電網及 EMC 要求差距對照，供出口商參考。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TISI conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current TISI, EGAT, MEA, EPPO, customs, and national market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TISI 合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行 TISI、EGAT、MEA、EPPO、海关及市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TISI 合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行 TISI、EGAT、MEA、EPPO、海關及市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: TISI product certification (mod-1 or mod-5 scheme) under TIS 2783 with IE2 minimum efficiency is the primary mandatory requirement; China's IE3 baseline generally exceeds the floor but separate TISI certification is still required.
answer_first.zh: 依据 TIS 2783 的 TISI 产品认证（mod-1 或 mod-5 方案），IE2 最低能效为主要强制要求；中国 IE3 基准通常超过门槛，但仍需单独取得 TISI 认证。
answer_first.zht: 依據 TIS 2783 的 TISI 產品認證（mod-1 或 mod-5 方案），IE2 最低能效為主要強制要求；中國 IE3 基準通常超過門檻，但仍需單獨取得 TISI 認證。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
